meaning: n.新潮人物,穿着时髦的人adj.流行的
examples: He was trying to be really cool and trendy.
The main reason people pay extra for a Dyson is because it is a vacuum cleaner with a trendy brand.
I used to wear trendy gear but it just looked ridiculous.
The trendy 25-storey W hotel in Polanco dominates the edgier side of the DF hotel scene.
And despite mounting popularity, Kalwill thinks the biking culture has yet to transition from trendy to mainstream.
